kpiDefinitions.name: Pass Rate
kpiDefinitions.definition: % of test cases that passed in a given run

kpiDefinitions.name: Escaped Defect Rate
kpiDefinitions.definition: % of defects that reached production

kpiDefinitions.name: AI Mapping Accuracy
kpiDefinitions.definition: Accuracy of AI in mapping tax form fields

kpiDefinitions.name: Flaky Test Rate
kpiDefinitions.definition: % of tests with inconsistent results

kpiDefinitions.name: Self-Healing Success Rate
kpiDefinitions.definition: % of healing events resolved without human

kpiDefinitions.name: Release Confidence Score
kpiDefinitions.definition: Composite score of release readiness

kpiDefinitions.name: Regression Cycle Time
kpiDefinitions.definition: Time from code commit to regression completion

kpiDefinitions.name: Defect Density
kpiDefinitions.definition: Defects per 1,000 lines of code

kpiDefinitions.name: Test Maintenance Overhead
kpiDefinitions.definition: Weekly hours spent fixing broken test scripts
kpiDefinitions.formula: Hours spent on script fixes per week

kpiDefinitions.name: AI Confidence Score
kpiDefinitions.definition: Model certainty score on a classification/extraction

kpiDefinitions.name: Shadow Mode Approval Rate
kpiDefinitions.definition: % of auto-heals approved by QA engineers

kpiDefinitions.name: Synthetic Data Compliance
kpiDefinitions.definition: % of generated records passing PII checks

kpiDefinitions.name: P95 Latency
kpiDefinitions.definition: 95th percentile response time under load
kpiDefinitions.formula: Value below which 95% of requests fall

kpiDefinitions.name: MTTR
kpiDefinitions.definition: Avg time from defect detection to fix

kpiDefinitions.name: Code Coverage
kpiDefinitions.definition: % of code exercised by automated tests

kpiDefinitions.name: Test Automation Rate
kpiDefinitions.definition: % of test cases that are automated

kpiDefinitions.name: Mean Time to Detection
kpiDefinitions.definition: Avg time from defect introduction to detection

kpiDefinitions.name: Test Execution Speed
kpiDefinitions.definition: Tests executed per minute

kpiDefinitions.name: Retest Efficiency
kpiDefinitions.definition: % of retests that pass on first attempt

kpiDefinitions.name: Environment Uptime
kpiDefinitions.definition: % of time test environments are available

kpiDefinitions.name: Defect Removal Efficiency
kpiDefinitions.definition: % of defects found before production

kpiDefinitions.name: Test Data Freshness
kpiDefinitions.definition: Age of synthetic test data in use

kpiDefinitions.name: Agent Accuracy Variance
kpiDefinitions.definition: Std deviation of AI agent accuracy across runs

kpiDefinitions.name: SLA Compliance Rate
kpiDefinitions.definition: % of tenant SLAs met

kpiDefinitions.name: Parallel Execution Ratio
kpiDefinitions.definition: Degree of test parallelization

formulaExamples.name: Release Confidence Score
formulaExamples.formula:
Release Confidence Score = 
  (Code Coverage × 0.20) +
  (Regression Pass Rate × 0.30) +
  (AI Accuracy × 0.25) +
  (Performance SLA × 0.15) +
  (Defect Density Score × 0.10)

formulaExamples.name: Escaped Defect Rate
formulaExamples.formula: Escaped Defect Rate = (Production Bugs / Total Bugs Found) × 100

formulaExamples.name: Self-Healing Success Rate
formulaExamples.formula: Self-Healing Success Rate = (Auto-Healed / Total Healing Events) × 100
